sections.title: Dialogue if the player is the house owner

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you feel about all the more powerful monsters?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: There are no monsters more powerful than us!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: We're the top monster of all Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No you're not. The Kalphite Queen is more powerful than you!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: Kalphite Queen? What's that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: She's a giant insect who lives in the desert.

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: An insect?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: Ha ha ha ha!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: No insect could be tougher than us! We're the best!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, she's way tougher than you!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: I don't believe it!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: And even if this Kalphite Queen is real, which I doubt, second best isn't bad, is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But it's not just the Kalphite Queen. What about the TzTok-Jad?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: Never heard of it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or the Dagannoth Rex?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: You're making it up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or the Chaos Elemental?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: Now then, how do you know you're not just making all these monsters up to demoralise us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right then, what about me?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: Puny human! You're not a fearsome monster!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I defeated you, didn't I? So I must be stronger than you!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: You got lucky! I'll get you next time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now that you're a stuffed head? I don't think so!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which of you heads is...

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: I am!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: Shut up! I am!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: Don't be silly! It's obvious that I am!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you don't even know what I was going to say!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: It doesn't matter. I'm the strongest, cleverest, and most attractive. Whatever it is, I am the most of it!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: Just a minute. What if it's something bad?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: Good point. What is it you were going to say? Because if it's something good, I'm it, but if it's something bad then it's one of these two ugly mugs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've forgotten what I was going to ask now.

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: Me! I am!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: Sorry, just said that on reflex.

sections.title: Dialogue if the player is a house guest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, [House owner] killed the King Black Dragon!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: No [he/she] didn't!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (left head)
lines.text: What? Oh, ah, no, of course [he/she] didn't. We're actually an artificial likeness of the King Black Dragon. No one could really kill the King Black Dragon!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: No! We're - I mean, it's - far too powerful!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (right head)
lines.text: What are you talking about? Of course we're the King Black Dragon!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon (middle head)
lines.text: Shut up, you idiot!
